title: euphrasia simonkaiana
intro: Euphrasia simonkaiana, also known as Simon's eyebright, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Euphrasia simonkaiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various eye and respiratory conditions.
